mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations ( people_count, representative_name, phone_number, course_name, remarks, member_id, reservation_date ) VALUES ( #{peopleCount}, #{representativeName}, #{phoneNumber}, #{courseName}, #{remarks}, #{memberId}, #{reservationDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, people_count, representative_name, phone_number, course_name, remarks, created_at, member_id, status, reservation_date FROM reservations ORDER BY reservation_date DESC
SELECT id, people_count, representative_name, phone_number, course_name, remarks, created_at, member_id, status, reservation_date FROM reservations WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE reservations SET representative_name = #{representativeName}, reservation_date = #{reservationDate}, people_count = #{peopleCount}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, course_name = #{courseName} WHERE id = #{id}
